instructions: Follow review.md. FastAPI service; focus on app_v2/, config/, and tests/. Prioritize security, correctness, and error handling at I/O boundaries. Respect architecture invariants: do not suggest reordering the main.py middleware stack; pagination is limit/offset (not page/page_size); only auth.PUBLIC_PATHS (/, /docs, /redoc, /openapi.json, /health) are public and every other route requires X-API-Key. Do not flag dependency versions (Dependabot-managed), Black/ruff formatting, or speculative refactors.

files.description: Shared code review standard and architecture invariants
